hero.subtitle: Sonopilot connects emerging artists with the right people — real feedback, meaningful engagement, one hub to track everything and grow your music community.
hero.screenshotAlt: Sonopilot — artist view with profile discovery

items: One hub for all your networks

problem.sub: Stop scattering your efforts. Centralise your visibility and connect with the right people — every interaction starts with you.
without: You post into the void — zero feedback, zero signal
You juggle SoundCloud, Spotify… with no big picture
You like at random, hoping to get discovered
You don't know who's really listening
Hollow comments, followers who vanish — no real community
You reject fake engagement — but without a method, you spin your wheels
You end up wondering: is it worth it?

withCards.title: Qualified listeners
withCards.body: Profiles surfaced to match your styles — not at random.

withCards.title: One central hub
withCards.body: SoundCloud today, more platforms on the way.

withCards.title: Targeted interactions
withCards.body: Follow, like, comment with the right people.

withCards.title: Clear dashboards
withCards.body: Country, genre, stats for each profile at a glance.

withCards.title: Time for your music
withCards.body: Less noise, more useful exchanges with your community.

pillars.title: What Sonopilot changes for you
pillars.lead: Less random shots. More decisions that make sense — and you're always in control.
pillars.sub: You browse, you listen, you decide. We help you see clearly; the action stays yours.

items.label: Fanbase
items.manifesto: Explore listeners who match your sound.
items.description: Sonopilot surfaces active listeners in your genres. Check their profiles and activity — then choose whether to follow.
items.imageAlt: Audience tab — qualified listener profiles with country and genre

items.label: Artists
items.manifesto: Your niche, one stage — without leaving the app.
items.description: Listen, like, and comment on tracks from artists like you. Built-in player, clear profiles: fewer tabs, more useful exchanges.
items.imageAlt: Artist detail — profile and embedded SoundCloud player

items.label: Hub
items.manifesto: One place to manage what matters.
items.description: Dashboard, SoundCloud tracks, stats — centralised. More of the network (Spotify, YouTube…) is coming; you keep the same habit.
items.imageAlt: My Tracks page — SoundCloud catalogue with plays, likes, comments

transparency.intro: Sonopilot doesn't replace great production or release discipline. We help you be a bit more visible and save time for what matters — your community and fellow artists.
points: Every interaction — follow, like, comment — is decided and triggered by you.
Built-in limits for responsible use that respects platform terms.
Short comments, no links — no spam.
No hidden actions: you see everything, you control everything.
transparency.imageAlt: Tracks tab — SoundCloud catalogue with stats and trends

platforms.sub: SoundCloud is the first integration — more are on the way. Sign up to help choose what's next.

founder.title: Hey, I'm Valentin 👋
founder.p1After: . As an independent artist, I've felt the same frustration: dropping a track and hearing nothing back — not because the music is bad, but because no one sees it.
founder.p2After: . Since then I've refined the product feature by feature with a clear vision:

bullets.text: for all your music networks — no more juggling ten tabs.
, your rules — every interaction starts with you, zero fake engagement.
with artists — the product is in alpha; your feedback shapes the next feature.

alphaCta.title: Join the alpha — 100% free
alphaCta.body: We're building Sonopilot with artists, not behind closed doors. Your voice matters; your feedback shapes the product.

items.question: Do you buy streams or followers?
items.answer: Never. Sonopilot is a discovery tool. Every interaction you make is manual and individual.

items.question: Who decides on interactions?
items.answer: You do. You browse profiles, you listen, and you choose each interaction. Nothing goes out without your action.

items.question: Does this replace a community manager or good production?
items.answer: No. Sonopilot is a complement to save time and be a bit more visible. Your music quality and consistency still drive your career.

items.question: SoundCloud only for now?
items.answer: Yes — it's the first alpha integration. Spotify, YouTube, Bandcamp, Beatport, and TikTok are in development — alpha testers will help pick what's next.

items.question: Are my data and SoundCloud account safe?
items.answer: Secure OAuth — your credentials are never stored on our side. You can disconnect and delete your account anytime.

items.question: When will other platforms arrive?
items.answer: We're building with alpha testers. Join us to influence the roadmap and get notified when your platform goes live.

items.question: Is it really free?
items.answer: Yes, for the entire alpha. No card required, no commitment.
